plans.title: Make Studio Feel Like Studio
plans.current_workstream: Wave 0 appears complete; closure proof needed
plans.next_action: Close Wave 0 or document exact remaining proof, then start Wave 1 Workspace Substrate
plans.open_blockers: Wave 0 status stale until closure is recorded
tasks: Close Wave 0 or document remaining proof
Define canonical workspace state
Persist workspace/session state across reload
Make layout presets real
Split Inspect from Project
Make bottom dock a real status/log/queue/terminal surface
assumptions: Wave 0 checklist appears complete from the report but needs direct closure proof.

plans.title: Build as Traceable Fulfillment System
plans.current_workstream: Trace infrastructure shipped; fulfillment UI pending
plans.next_action: Surface fulfillment status in Studio so unusual requests are not silently flattened
plans.open_blockers: No active blocker; UI surfacing is pending
tasks: Surface fulfillment status in Studio
Show requested versus completed versus deferred features
Add trace and fulfillment panels for run id, decisions, provider, cost, verification, and follow-up work
Connect build trace outcomes to learning and capture promotion
assumptions: Trace infrastructure landed before the UI fully exposed it.

plans.title: Baseline Failure Closure Review
plans.current_workstream: WS1 routing permissions, WS2 planning fence, WS3 deploy preflight
plans.next_action: Revise or supersede serious findings before execution
tasks: Resolve Developer Mode precondition in Shay Desk build path
Prevent slug collision overwrite
Avoid divergent site creation through handlePlanning
Preserve or extract shared site creation and switching helper
Add deploy preflight and child-process spawn-error handling
Add regression tests for wrong active site, collision, competitor mentions, and deploy commands
assumptions: This plan should not run unchanged because review findings are execution-risky.

plans.title: Canonical BuildIntent v2
plans.next_action: Declare v2 current and archive v1, or document why both remain active
plans.open_blockers: v1 and v2 both present with no supersession record
tasks: Declare v2 current or archive it
Decide what happens to v1
Define identity, goal, pages, features, design direction, blockers, and confidence
Map Studio Chat, Shay, pasted briefs, and autonomous build onto the same intent
Attach P0/P1 diagnostics as evidence
assumptions: v2 is probably intended to supersede v1, but the repo does not yet say that canonically.

plans.title: Iterative Roadmap Forward
plans.current_workstream: Immediate tier: JJ B&A rebuild, header links, build confirmation
plans.next_action: Convert immediate roadmap items into task records
plans.open_blockers: Roadmap items are not normalized into tasks
tasks: Convert JJ B&A rebuild into a verification task
Convert header-link bug into a task or close it
Convert build-confirmation UX into a task or close it
Convert edge-case suite into a plan/task group
Mark roadmap items active, closed, superseded, stale, or backlog
assumptions: The roadmap is useful as intake, but should not be treated as executable truth.

plans.title: Multi-Agent Resumable Plan System
plans.current_workstream: Plan packet schema and coordination rules
plans.next_action: Merge into or mark superseded by Shay Process Intelligence after review
tasks: Define plan packet schema
Define workstream schema
Define job grouping rules
Define agent assignment rules
Define resumability rules
assumptions: This document becomes either the design note under the parent plan or gets superseded by the registry model.

plans.title: Shay Process Intelligence, Artifact Memory, and Multi-Agent Work System
plans.next_action: Use this as the parent for plan/task/run intelligence if Fritz accepts it
plans.open_blockers: Relationship to multi-agent resumable plan system still needs review
tasks: Create plans/registry.json
Create task, job, run, handoff, capture, proof, and research ledgers
Add fam-hub plan status, task list, and run status
Create offline/web capture packet format
Build reusable FAMTastic project context pack
Expose the same model in Shay and Studio later
assumptions: This is the right parent for process intelligence unless Fritz chooses a different parent.

plans.title: FAMtastic Total Ask / Empire Synthesis
plans.next_action: Accept, modify, or supersede before downstream plans treat it as authority
tasks: Review the proposal
Accept, modify, or supersede
Record downstream authority rules
assumptions: Downstream plans may cite this as inspiration, not ratified authority, until reviewed.

plans.title: Gap 1/2/3 and Gap 4 Closure
plans.current_workstream: Verification rebuild remains as proof path
plans.next_action: Link as evidence under BuildIntent or baseline closure, then archive or close
plans.open_blockers: Closure proof is scattered across multiple docs
tasks: Link closure docs as evidence
Run or record JJ B&A verification proof
Archive or mark closed after evidence attachment
assumptions: The gaps are probably closed, but proof needs a canonical parent.

plans.title: P0 / P1 Diagnostics
plans.next_action: Attach diagnostics to parent plan and close as evidence
plans.open_blockers: Diagnostics are not linked to a parent plan
tasks: Attach P0/P1 diagnostics to the owning parent
Close accepted diagnostic files as evidence
Promote remaining issues into tasks
assumptions: These are evidence artifacts rather than standalone plans.

plans.title: MBSH Reunion Site Plan
plans.current_workstream: V1 reunion backend, media, ops, and deployment tasks
plans.next_action: Create site-scoped registry and promote reusable platform learnings back to platform plans
plans.open_blockers: Site execution is not separated from platform execution in the registry yet
tasks: Create site-scoped plan registry entry
Track backend, RSVP, sponsor, media, chatbot, deployment, and content tasks separately
Promote reusable platform learnings into the platform registry
Keep deploy repo state separate from Studio repo state
assumptions: MBSH should pilot site-scoped task tracking without contaminating platform plan status.
